en: It seems you cannot be replaced And I'm the one who'll stay
ko: 당신은 대체 불가능한 것 같고, 내가 남을 거야, 오.

en: You know it's not the same as it was
In this world It's just us
You know it's not the same as it was

ko: 예전과 같지 않아, 예전과 같지 않아.
예전과 같지 않아, 예전과 같지 않아.

en: You know it's not the same Answer the phone
ko: 당신은 같지 않다는 걸 알고 있어.

en: Harry, you're no good alone Why are you sitting at home on the floor?
What kind of pills do you want? Ringing the bell
And nobody's coming to help Your daddy lives by himself
He just wants to know that you're well
ko: 당신 아버지는 혼자 살고 있어, 당신이 잘 지내는지 알고 싶어 해.
